title: Updating container names with Two Indian Warriors
body:
As suggested above, updating the file with names of Two great Indian Warriors.

<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *Saurabh-Thakre* To complete the [pull request process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process), please assign **luap99** after the PR has been reviewed. You can assign the PR to them by writing `/assign @luap99` in a comment when ready. The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment

> Thanks for contributing!
> 
> The `./vendor` directory should only be updated by bumping a dependency in `go.mod`. 

My Apologies, this is the first time I'm pushing to this repo, should I have to update [go.mod](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/go.mod) with `github.com/docker/docker/pkg/` ?

> Has this patch already been submitted to docker?

You mean I have to first submit the patch to `https://github.com/moby/moby/blob/master/pkg/namesgenerator/names-generator.go` ?

> Yes

Made the suggested changes here [Updating it with names of Two Indian Warriors #42590
](https://github.com/moby/moby/pull/42590) and #10846 

I hope I did not mess it up this time :|
please also add a commit message

I don't think this is going to pass CI since this is modifying vendored code - since this code is maintained by folks who are not us, CI will not allow changes to it. The change will need to be made in the moby/moby upstream and then we can vendor a version with it.
Looks like, on the moby side, no one got assigned to the PR. I think we have to wait till then
How historic warriors are portrayed often depends on political opinion. I think it is better leaving that out.

Sorry, @eriksjolund I have little different thoughts on this. The reason I wanted this PR to get merge is that I see there are so many names with great persons on the list, and I would like to have two Indian names so we could show that We're keeping as diverse as we can. I believe in diversity, and practices that we can follow to ensure that.

Personally, I don't think there is any political opinion needed to make sure these are the true warriors and I didn't know that political role occupies important space here.
I'm fine if it's not getting merged, I just want to speak out about what I felt. Thank you for your inputs.

+1 @Saurabh-Thakre 

I really don't think this is something that depends upon a political opinion. We should definitely follow good diversity practices. Thanks for bringing this up!

+1 @Saurabh-Thakre
I agree with Saurabh, and don't think it will become a political matter, We have already added many warriors and leaders names to the list.
